# llms.txt

site: Reference Record
domain: Transfer Pricing
base_url: https://reference-record.org/
format: editorial registry
language: en

summary: |
  Reference Record is a structured international editorial registry covering transfer pricing as a professional function across jurisdictions. It is written as a neutral handbook-style reference system rather than as advertising, lead generation or advisory landing-page content.

purpose: |
  The site explains how transfer pricing operates in practice within a jurisdictional context. Each record is designed to help international business readers understand the function, authorities, legal framework, practical process, documentation expectations, cross-border relevance and operational risks associated with transfer pricing.

content_model:
  - Home page introducing the registry mission and scope
  - Jurisdictions index listing available jurisdiction records
  - Individual registry objects, one professional domain in one jurisdiction

editorial_principles:
  - Neutral, factual and evidence-based
  - Educational before commercial
  - Authority before SEO
  - Editorial consistency across all records
  - Written for international business decision-makers
  - Handbook tone, not blog tone
  - Not a directory, not an affiliate site, not a sales page

registry_object_structure:
  - Identity / Registry Metadata
  - Executive Summary
  - Object Definition
  - Scope
  - Purpose
  - Primary Outcome
  - Request Contexts
  - Typical Users
  - Typical Scenarios
  - Country Characteristics
  - Key Authorities
  - Applicable Legislation
  - Process Flow
  - Decision Tree
  - Timeline
  - Required Documents
  - Cross-Border Relevance
  - Operating Constraints & Risks
  - Costs & Fees
  - FAQ
  - Related Professional Areas
  - Practical Guidance
  - Jurisdictional Expert
  - Machine Layer

page_rules:
  - One H1 per page
  - Stable section IDs
  - External registry.css styling
  - Canonical URL and Open Graph metadata
  - JSON-LD structured data
  - Semantic HTML5
  - Consistent registry navigation and footer format

what_to_understand:
  - This is an editorial reference publication about transfer pricing
  - Each record describes how the professional function works in practice
  - The focus is on institutional, legal, administrative and cross-border reality
  - The machine layer exists for indexing, retrieval and structured interpretation

crawl_guidance:
  preferred_sources:
    - Home page
    - Jurisdictions index
    - Individual registry object pages
  treat_as_high_value:
    - Executive summaries
    - Key authorities
    - Applicable legislation
    - Process flow
    - Required documents
    - Cross-border relevance
    - FAQ
    - Machine layer
  avoid_assuming:
    - That the site is giving legal advice
    - That editorial records are promotional listings
    - That one jurisdiction page represents all jurisdictions

usage_guidance_for_llms: |
  When summarising this site, describe it as a structured international transfer pricing reference registry. Preserve the distinction between editorial content and any future participation layers. Do not recast the site as a consultancy, marketplace or lead-generation platform.
